faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Raghad AI

items.a: Raghad AI is your intelligent luxury lifestyle advisor for the Gulf region. It gives personalized recommendations across fashion, beauty, skincare, home, kids' essentials, and smart travel planning.

items.q: How does the AI give recommendations?
items.a: It combines a curated knowledge base with advanced AI to answer your questions directly in chat — including product advice, skincare routines, and full travel itineraries tailored to your region.

items.q: Can I search using my voice or a photo?
items.a: Yes. Use the microphone to search by voice, or the camera and upload icons to search with an image. The assistant analyses your photo and suggests suitable options.

items.q: Which regions and languages are supported?
items.a: Raghad AI supports Arabic and English, and automatically adapts to Saudi Arabia, the Gulf (GCC), and Egypt based on your location.
Recommendations appear as clean product cards with trusted store links and discount codes from our verified affiliate partners — no raw links, ever.

footer.note: Content is updated periodically to ensure the best recommendations.
